article.title: Noizekid: A Profile of the Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
article.subtitle: Collaborations with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer mark his trajectory.
article.author: D. Varela
article.excerpt: Noizekid stands out as a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer with a growing list of high-profile collaborations and a notable sample pack release.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his work with prominent figures in the music industry. His collaborations include projects with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer, among others.

In addition to his production work, Noizekid has released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation. This pack contains a comprehensive collection of his samples, loops, and drums, offering insight into the sonic tools he employs in his productions.
His approach to production is characterized by a blend of moombahton and dancehall elements, reflecting a distinct style that has garnered attention within electronic music circles.

Noizekid's work is further contextualized by his associations with similar artists such as ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot, indicating a shared creative milieu within the electronic music scene.
